source_pr.title: ddl: allow enum to append values
source_pr.body:
## What have you changed? (mandatory)

fix #6398

Allow to append new values to existing ENUM fields.
Removing values or changing existing values is still unsupported.

## What are the type of the changes (mandatory)?

- Improvement (non-breaking change which is an improvement to an existing feature)

## How has this PR been tested (mandatory)?

- added unit test cases in ddl/db_change_test.go

symptoms: result, err := s.execQuery(tk, "select c4, c2 from t order by c4 asc") (ddl/db_change_test.go)
failure_signature: result, err := s.execQuery(tk, "select c4, c2 from t order by c4 asc") (ddl/db_change_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky around DDL/schema changes where schema propagation is asynchronous. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: result, err := s.execQuery(tk, "select c4, c2 from t order by c4 asc") (ddl/db_change_test.go)
